name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). 7 bundled profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Researcher / Watch Party / Auction Watcher) + 16 Quick Style moods (Brutalist / Zen / Retro CRT / Executive / Neon / Hacker / Glacier / Midnight / Featherlight / Industrial / Trading Floor / Scholar / Samba / Borealis / Cinema / Levitation). 14 major exchanges (NYSE · TSX · B3 · LSE · Euronext · XETRA · SIX · JSE · TSE · HKEX · SSE · KRX · NSE · ASX) covering all populated continents, grouped by region (Americas / Europe / Africa / Asia / Oceania) via iana-prefix detection. Live 5-state session tracking (OPEN · LUNCH · PRE-MARKET · AFTER-HOURS · CLOSED) — amber ◐ dawn + rose ◒ dusk auction signals, gated by SessionSignalWindow (off / 5-60 min, Quick-Style-composable). Rocket-launch T-HH:MM:SS countdown (progressive to T-Nd Hh MMm SSs at ≥24h, every scale ticks seconds). Tabulated sections with frosted-glass. Clipboard snapshots with self-documenting UTC-stamped headers via per-segment Copy actions. /floating-clock:diagnose slash command for health reports. Reveal App in Finder + Copy Time/Active/Next menu utilities. Aesthetic surface: 29 color themes · 14 progress-bar glyphs · 8 corner styles · 9 shadow presets · 7 segment-gap presets · 7 font weights (thin → black) · 7 letter-spacing values · 7 line-spacing values · 7 time-separator glyphs · 6 density profiles · 5-phase sun/moon glyph · global + per-segment FontWeight/Transparency · 9 DateFormat locales. **v1.14 headline: full urgency-cluster customization + atmospheric shadow expansion**. iter-212's imminence-gradient countdown (Weber-Fechner log scale + HSB hue rotation 120°→0° + 1Hz pulse — patterns from Grafana/Datadog/Apple Health heat-map convention) gains two user-configurable levers: `UrgencyHorizon` (5/15/30/60/120/240 min — day-traders pick a tight 5min closing-bell glow; macro-watchers pick 240min for slow overnight build) and `UrgencyFlash` (off/subtle/normal/intense — opt out of the pulse entirely or dial up the dim-half intensity). Both levers Quick-Style-composable: Hacker (5min/off — terminal-quiet), Trading Floor (15min/intense — closing-bell desk), Featherlight (240min/subtle — ethereal whisper), Industrial (30min/intense — mechanical), Scholar (120min/normal — studious), Zen (subtle pulse). ShadowStyle catalog 7→9 with two soft-diffuse plain-black presets: `vignette` (radius 18, opacity 0.40 — cinematic atmospheric depth) + `floating` (radius 14, opacity 0.30, offset 0,-12 — wide hover/levitation). Two new Quick Style moods exercise them: Cinema (midnight_blue + vignette + thin/airy — film-noir credits) + Levitation (soft_glass + floating + spacious — content-floats vibe). All numeric constants stay in `Sources/content/UrgencyColors.h` as `extern const` SSoT (tweak any and both ACTIVE + NEXT update simultaneously); UrgencyHorizon + UrgencyFlash dispatchers fall back to the SSoT default for unset/empty/unknown. 87 test fixtures total. Sub-0.1% idle CPU, ~224 KB signed binary.
